title: ReQ: Shulkers In Shulkers
body:
# 📥 **Installation**
1. Download the latest .jar
2. Press Windows + R
3. Type in "%appdata%"
4. locate /.minecraft/mods
5. put the .jar into the mods file

# ⭐ **Features**
1. Put Shulkers in Shulkers
   
   ![Image of Shulkers in a Shulker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71934844127cdadb22fe7d454e127e3e0d0e9d9e.png)
